function.message: Sent draft email to Blue Harbor Bank with subject "Security review follow-up" and the requested body text.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed AGENTS.md rule to send outbound email via outbox; followed outbox/README.MD invariants by using seq id for filename, writing sent:false, and bumping seq.json.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity and recipient were resolved via accounts/acct_004.json (Blue Harbor Bank) and contacts/cont_004.json (benthe.versteeg@blue-harbor-bank.example.com). Email was written to outbox/84451.json using the pre-bump seq id from outbox/seq.json, then seq advanced to 84452 per outbox/README.MD.
